title: Analysis: 1 month into the war, Iran is fighting Israel and the US with insurgent tactics
Three Lebanese journalists killed in Israeli strike, say broadcasters
Tears and defiance as Lebanese family bury child, 11, killed in Israeli strike
Iran War Live Updates: Israel Strikes Tehran as Regional Diplomats Gather in Pakistan for Talks
text: Israel said it launched a wave of strikes targeting infrastructure in Tehran and other areas, and Iran retaliated. Officials from Saudi Arabia, Egypt and Turkey were meeting in Pakistan in hopes of finding a way to end the war.
